source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Card Token API / URL https://docs.tappaysdk.com/tutorial/en/back.html#pay-by-card-token-api

parameters.name: x-api-key
parameters.description: Header authentication key (partner_key). x-api-key: YourPartnerKey.

parameters.name: card_key
parameters.description: Card authorization key.

parameters.name: card_token
parameters.description: Card token.

parameters.name: partner_key
parameters.description: Authentication key for each individual partner.

parameters.name: merchant_id
parameters.description: Involved merchant's identifier as defined on Portal.

parameters.name: merchant_group_id
parameters.description: Merchant management settings set on the portal. Cannot be used with merchant_id at the same time.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Transaction price. Except TWD, times 100 (HKD1 = 100).

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Transaction currency, ISO 4217 alphabetic code, e.g. TWD.

parameters.name: order_number
parameters.description: Self-defined identifier for each transaction. Does not allow null.

parameters.name: bank_transaction_id
parameters.description: Transaction identifier for the bank. Must be unique. Recommended to define to avoid error 421.

parameters.name: details
parameters.description: Item description. Required for PCI compliance; forwarded if acquirer supports.

parameters.name: cardholder
parameters.description: Information of the cardholder (see Cardholder schema).

parameters.name: cardholder_verify
parameters.description: Authentication (KYC) fields (see CardholderVerify schema). Supported: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: kyc_verification_merchant_id
parameters.description: Merchant id that can only do authentication except authorization.

parameters.name: instalment
parameters.description: Number of intervals of payments. Default 0. Only Support: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: delay_capture_in_days
parameters.description: Days between authorization and capture. Default 0. -1 disables automatic capture.

parameters.name: three_domain_secure
parameters.description: Enable 3D Secure authentication. Default false. Only applicable to Direct Pay.

parameters.name: result_url
parameters.description: Transaction result notification URL object (see ResultUrl schema). Required for e-payment and Direct Pay 3D transactions.

parameters.name: card_ccv
parameters.description: Security code. Cannot be used together with ccv_prime. Supported only for Direct Pay. Use when ccv_prime was not obtained but bank should verify the security code, or for 3DS 2.0 authentication with an AMEX card.

parameters.name: redeem
parameters.description: Whether to use the redeem. Support: National Credit Card Center of R.O.C. Only Support: Direct Pay.

parameters.name: additional_data
parameters.description: Data encrypted and decrypted for other customization requirements.

parameters.name: ccv_prime
parameters.description: One-time token of security code returned from get-ccv-prime. Cannot be used with card_ccv. Expires after 90 seconds. Support: Direct Pay. Sandbox test values provided in source.

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: ID of each device. Must be included when using TapPay RBA transaction risk analysis system. Obtain via Get Device ID of TapPay SDK.

parameters.name: is_merchant_initiated_transaction
parameters.description: Whether the transaction is a Merchant-Initiated Transaction (MIT) or Customer-Initiated Transaction (CIT). Default false. true = MIT (recurring, subscription), false = CIT.

parameters.name: cardholderinfo_prime
parameters.description: Obtain using get-cardholderinfo-prime.

request.description: JSON body. Header x-api-key. Pay using a permanent card_key/card_token; Sandbox/Production /tpc/payment/pay-by-token

responses.description: Transaction result JSON; status=0 indicates success. HTTP status not stated by source (200 assumed).
responses.source: tappay-backend-api.md — Pay by Card Token API Response
